race_name: L'Etape Brasil by Tour de France
query: L'Etape Brasil by Tour de France gran fondo cycling Campos do Jordao

videos.title: Highlights | 🇧🇷 L'Etape Brasil - Campos do Jordão by Tour de France | 2024 🚲
videos.channel: L'Etape Series by Tour de France
videos.description:
Check out how L'Étape Campos do Jordão 2024 went, where determination, focus, and friendship pedaling together made all the difference!

---------

L'Etape by Tour de France is a series of amateur cycling events designed to experience the Tour de France Legend. It is the only event where you can race and feel like a Tour de France champion, and where you can enjoy the Tour de France unique atmosphere and passion.

“The Tour de France is the world's greatest cycling race. Each year it is passionately followed by fans around the world so it has naturally given rise to L'Etape by Tour de France series”, says Christian Prudhomme, Tour de France director. 

The series has now expanded to more than 22 international locations including:
🇫🇷 France
🇧🇷 Brasil
🇲🇽 México
🇨🇴 Colombia
🇨🇳 China
🇦🇺 Australia
🇹🇭 Thailand
🇨🇭 Switzerland
🇮🇩 Indonesia
🇪🇸 Spain
🇲🇾 Malaysia
🇸🇰 Slovakia
🇨🇿 Czech Republic
🇬🇧 UK
🇨🇦 Canada
🇺🇸 USA
🇳🇱 Netherlands
🇨🇾 Cyprus
🇸🇮 Slovenia
🇪🇨 Ecuador
🇪🇬 Egypt
🇹🇷 Türkiye
🇨🇷 Costa Rica
🇵🇹 Portugal
🇪🇸 Spain 

Among these Tour de France official cycling events is of course L'Étape du Tour. With a peloton of 15 000 riders and 50 nationalities, it is Europe's biggest cycling event. Riding on the same routes and under the same conditions as Tour de France champions: this is the promise that L'Étape du Tour has kept since 1993.

Check out https://www.letapebytourdefrance.com/ for more information.

Join us on:
-Facebook 👉 https://www.facebook.com/letapebytourdefrance
-Instagram 👉 https://www.instagram.com/letapebytourdefrance/
-Strava 👉 https://www.strava.com/clubs/letapebyletourdefrance

videos.title: 🇧🇷 L’Étape Brazil - Campos do Jordão by Tour de France 2025 | Highlights 🌄
videos.channel: L'Etape Series by Tour de France
videos.description:
Campos do Jordão (Brazil), July 28 — The Campos do Jordão edition of L'Étape Brasil by Tour de France presented by Nubank took place this Sunday (28), welcoming more than 3,500 amateur cyclists from across Brazil and abroad.

---------

L'Etape Series is a series of amateur cycling events designed to experience the Tour de France Legend. It is the only event where you can race and feel like a Tour de France champion, and where you can enjoy the Tour de France unique atmosphere and passion.

“The Tour de France is the world's greatest cycling race. Each year it is passionately followed by fans around the world so it has naturally given rise to L'Etape by Tour de France series”, says Christian Prudhomme, Tour de France director. 

The series has now expanded to more than 22 international locations including:

🇫🇷 France
🇧🇷 Brazil
🇧🇬 Bulgaria
🇨🇷 Costa Rica
🇨🇿 Czech Republic
🇩🇰 Denmark
🇪🇨 Ecuador
🇺🇸 United States
🇬🇷 Greece
🇦🇪 United Arab Emirates
🇮🇪 Ireland
🇮🇹 Italy
🇲🇽 Mexico
🇵🇱 Poland
🇷🇴 Romania
🇸🇰 Slovakia
🇸🇮 Slovenia
🇹🇼 Taiwan
🇹🇷 Turkey


Among these Tour de France official cycling events is of course L'Étape du Tour. With a peloton of 45 000 riders and 50 nationalities, it is Europe's biggest cycling event. Riding on the same routes and under the same conditions as Tour de France champions: this is the promise that L'Étape du Tour has kept since 1993.

Check out https://www.letapeseries.com for more information.

Join us on:
-Facebook 👉 https://www.facebook.com/letapeseries

videos.title: L'Etape Brasil by Le Tour de France - HIGHLIGHTS 2018
videos.channel: L'Etape Series by Tour de France
videos.description:
In 2018 L'Etape Brasil by Le Tour de France took place around Campos do Jordão. Hills, passes and amazing landscapes, relive this edition watching the most beautiful images. 

---------

L'Etape by Le Tour de France is a series of amateur cycling events designed to experience Le Tour de France Legend. It is the only event where you can race and feel like a Tour de France champion, and where you can enjoy the Tour de France unique atmosphere and passion.

“The Tour de France is the world's greatest cycling race. Each year it is passionately followed by fans around the world so it has naturally given rise to L'Etape by Le Tour de France series”, said Christian Prudhomme, Tour de France director. The series has now expanded to 14 international locations including Colombia, Wales, Mexico, China, and Australia.

Among these Tour de France official cycling events is of course L'Étape du Tour. With a peloton of 15 000 riders and 50 nationalities, it is Europe's biggest cycling event. Riding on the same routes and under the same conditions as Tour de France champions: this is the promise that L'Étape du Tour has kept since 1993.

videos.title: L'ETAPE BRASIL BY TOUR DE FRANCE CAMPOS DO JORDÃO
videos.channel: Gordinho sem frescura Ciclismo na veia

videos.title: HIGHLIGHTS L'Étape Campos do Jordão 2025
videos.channel: L'Étape Brasil by Tour de France presented by Nu
videos.description:
✨ Que final de temporada!
Campos do Jordão foi palco de um final de semana inesquecível. 💛🚴‍♂
Aos milhares de atletas que encararam cada desafio com garra, nosso mais profundo OBRIGADO.
Aos patrocinadores, parceiros, equipe e staffs — vocês foram parte essencial de cada quilômetro percorrido.
Encerramos o L'Étape Brasil 2025 com o coração cheio de orgulho.
Que venha a próxima jornada! 💥
